description: Style Note Lightweight and soft, inner wear from chromozome epitomises comfort Fit and takes care of individual requirements with a lot of variety. Ensuring that you are relaxed inside and look good outside, these are stylish necessities that you shouldn't do without. Product Details Red Club boxer briefs, has a soft elasticated silver waistband, branding on the waistband on the outside, tagless comfort and double layered pouch for comfort and best fit Material and Care 96% cotton and 4% lycra Machine wash warm Do not iron on print Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
